meaning: 博林布鲁克(英国国王 Henry
examples: For the Bolingbroke group and others like them, opening in 2012 is a more realistic target.
It's not at all the point that a broad, ideological view of Richard II was any different from what Wilson said; that was perfectly true. Bolingbroke was considered a usurper.
Michael Bolingbroke , United's chief operating officer, said: "We believe that being a responsible football club means being part of our community in the widest possible sense."
One of Bolingbroke's first tasks it to increase Inter's home attendances at the San Siro, a stadium the club shares with AC Milan.
On arriving from England, Bolingbroke was surprised to learn Inter had no football museum of its own at the San Siro, though it does share one with AC Milan.
